entries.title: Dumbledore teaches Harry about Voldemort past

context.label: Dumbledore memory lessons before full Horcrux truth

content.fact: Dumbledore’s private lessons show Harry Voldemort’s past and build toward the Horcrux revelation; they do not make Ron or Hermione fluent in Horcrux knowledge by default.
content.injection: During the Year 6 memory-lessons phase, let Harry learn Voldemort history from Dumbledore, but block Ron and Hermione from full Horcrux exposition unless Harry has explicitly briefed them in this story. Enforce this as a high-priority Context gate for Dumbledore memory lessons before full Horcrux truth; block contradictory later-book or earlier-state knowledge unless accepted story lore explicitly overrides it.
constraints: Before the true Slughorn memory, the lessons are clues and history, not complete Horcrux strategy.
Dumbledore controls disclosure and does not broadcast the hunt to the wider school.
Apply only when Saga Context matches Dumbledore memory lessons before full Horcrux truth; if the scene is earlier, withhold this fact or state.
This card should be promoted when its characters, topics, or objects appear because it prevents timeline leakage.
antiLore: Do not let Hermione automatically know the Horcrux count, objects, or hunt plan during early/mid Year 6.
Do not let generic model memory, film shorthand, fanon, or later-book knowledge override the active book Context.
Do not reveal, assume, or discuss this outcome before the relevant anchor/window is active unless the user has created an AU branch.

temporalTightening.method: curated chronology point event: validFrom plus 10 days
temporalTightening.notes: End date narrowed so event-like lore does not remain active as an open-ended suggestion.

content.fact: Dumbledore is dead and Hogwarts leadership changes.
content.injection: Dumbledore is dead and Hogwarts leadership changes. Enforce this as a high-priority Context gate for Half-Blood Prince: Year 6; block contradictory later-book or earlier-state knowledge unless accepted story lore explicitly overrides it.
constraints: Apply only when Saga Context matches Half-Blood Prince: Year 6; if the scene is earlier, withhold this fact or state.
